title: TrustLens detection method
description: How a finding was produced. This is the mechanical method, not the confidence. Confidence is carried separately by evidence_strength, because a weak method can produce a strong finding and vice versa.

x-trustlens-semantics.declared_metadata: Read from a README, dataset card, manifest or metadata file. Records what the artifact SAYS, never what it does.
x-trustlens-semantics.static_ast: Derived from a parsed syntax tree of the artifact's own source. Syntactic match only — no reachability claim.
x-trustlens-semantics.static_ast_dataflow: Derived from a parsed syntax tree WITH a source-to-sink data flow. Stronger than static_ast; still no runtime-reachability claim.
x-trustlens-semantics.static_pattern: Textual or regular-expression match without a parse. Weakest static method; prone to matching strings and comments, so findings using it need a corroborating method before being treated as more than a lead.
x-trustlens-semantics.static_external_tool: Produced by an integrated third-party analyser. MUST record the tool name and version in the finding's rule_id/tool fields so the result is attributable and reproducible.
x-trustlens-semantics.archive_inspection: Derived from archive or serialized-container structure (e.g. pickle opcode stream, zip member listing) without executing it.
x-trustlens-semantics.config_derivation: Derived from a supplied environment description or deployment configuration. Inherits that description's description_captured_at staleness.
x-trustlens-semantics.policy_evaluation: Derived by evaluating a policy document (IAM, RBAC, network policy) under recorded interpretation rules.
x-trustlens-semantics.graph_derivation: Derived by composing two or more existing edges. Never stronger than its weakest input edge.
x-trustlens-semantics.dynamic_observation: Observed during a recorded sandbox execution. Establishes the behavior occurred in that run only.
x-trustlens-semantics.dynamic_blocked_observation: An operation was attempted and the sandbox blocked it. Establishes both the attempt and that the configured control blocked it in that run.
x-trustlens-semantics.manual_assertion: Entered by a human. Carries the human's identity and is never treated as machine-verified.
